title: Project Scaffold
description: Initialized the project with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Set up folder structure for components, pages, and utilities. Added ESLint and Prettier configurations to enforce code style consistency across the codebase.

title: Theme & Design Tokens
description: Defined comprehensive design tokens including color palette, typography scale, spacing system, and breakpoints. Implemented CSS custom properties for runtime theming and created a unified design specification document.

title: Responsive Layout Grid
description: Built a fluid responsive grid system using CSS Grid with 12-column layout. Implemented container queries for component-level responsiveness. Added utility classes for common layout patterns.

title: Navigation Header
description: Developed a responsive navigation header with mobile hamburger menu. Includes logo, primary nav links, CTA button, and user avatar dropdown. Smooth slide-in animation on mobile with accessible focus management.

title: Dark Mode Toggle
description: Implemented system-aware dark mode with manual override. Uses CSS custom properties for seamless theme switching. Persists user preference in localStorage and respects prefers-color-scheme media query.

title: Button Component System
description: Created a comprehensive button component with variants (primary, secondary, ghost, danger), sizes (sm, md, lg), and states (loading, disabled, active). Includes icon support and keyboard accessibility.

title: Card Component Library
description: Designed reusable card components with multiple variants: default, elevated, bordered, and interactive. Supports header, body, footer slots, image placement, and hover effects.

title: Modal Dialog System
description: Built an accessible modal dialog with focus trapping, keyboard dismissal (Escape), backdrop click handling, and smooth enter/exit animations. Supports nested stacking and portal rendering.

title: Toast Notification System
description: Implemented a toast notification system with success, error, warning, and info variants. Includes auto-dismiss with configurable duration, stack management, and slide-in animations.

title: Form Input Components
description: Created reusable form inputs: text, email, password, textarea, select, checkbox, radio, and toggle. Each with floating labels, validation states, error messages, and accessibility attributes.

title: Form Validation Logic
description: Implemented client-side form validation with Zod schemas. Real-time field validation on blur, debounced async validation, and cross-field validation rules. Display inline error messages.

title: Authentication Flow — Sign Up
description: Built the registration page with email/password fields, password strength indicator, terms acceptance checkbox, and social auth buttons (Google, GitHub). Handles duplicate email and validation errors gracefully.

title: Authentication Flow — Login
description: Developed the login page with email/password form, remember-me toggle, forgot password link, and social login options. Implements rate limiting feedback and session management.

title: Password Reset Flow
description: Created the complete password reset experience: request reset page, email confirmation screen, reset password form with token validation, and success confirmation. Handles expired tokens.

title: User Profile Page
description: Built the user profile page showing avatar, display name, email, join date, and activity stats. Includes avatar upload with preview and crop functionality.

title: Account Settings Panel
description: Designed the settings interface with sections for profile, security, notifications, and preferences. Tab-based navigation with unsaved changes warning on navigation.

title: Dashboard Overview
description: Created the main dashboard with summary cards (total users, revenue, active sessions), recent activity feed, and quick-action buttons. Data visualized with sparkline charts.

title: Data Table Component
description: Built a feature-rich data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, and column resizing. Supports server-side data loading with loading skeletons.

title: Search with Debounce
description: Implemented global search with debounced input, search history suggestions, keyboard navigation through results, and highlighted matching text. Supports multiple entity types.

title: Infinite Scroll Feed
description: Developed an infinite scroll component using Intersection Observer. Supports both top-to-bottom and bidirectional loading with scroll position restoration.

title: File Upload Component
description: Created drag-and-drop file upload with preview thumbnails, progress bars, file type validation, size limits, and multi-file queuing. Supports image, document, and video types.

title: Progress Indicator Component
description: Built linear and circular progress indicators with determinate and indeterminate states. Includes animation, label customization, and color variants.

title: Breadcrumb Navigation
description: Implemented dynamic breadcrumb component that auto-generates from route hierarchy. Supports custom labels, icons between segments, and collapsed overflow.

title: Pagination Component
description: Created accessible pagination with page numbers, prev/next buttons, ellipsis truncation for large page counts, and configurable sibling count.

title: Tabs Component
description: Built accessible tab component with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Home, End), different tab styles (underline, pill, enclosed), and lazy loading of tab panels.

title: Accordion Component
description: Implemented collapsible accordion with single and multiple expand modes, smooth height animation, keyboard navigation, and accessible ARIA attributes.

title: Tooltip Component
description: Created lightweight tooltip with 12 positional variants, delay on show/hide, arrow indicator, and rich HTML content support. Uses portal to avoid overflow clipping.

title: Badge & Tag Components
description: Designed badge and tag components with color variants, size options, dismissible tags, and icon support. Used for status indicators, labels, and filtering.

title: Avatar Component
description: Built avatar component supporting image, initials fallback, and status indicator dot. Includes size variants, group stacking with overlap, and ring borders.

title: Skeleton Loading Screens
description: Implemented skeleton placeholders for cards, tables, text blocks, and full-page layouts. Uses CSS animation for shimmer effect and matches final layout dimensions.

title: Error Boundary Component
description: Created React error boundary with fallback UI showing error message, stack trace in dev mode, and retry button. Logs errors to monitoring service.

title: Empty State Components
description: Designed empty state illustrations for no results, no data, and error states. Includes action buttons, contextual messages, and optional illustration slot.

title: Sidebar Navigation
description: Built collapsible sidebar with nested menu items, active state indicators, section headers, and collapse/expand animation. Supports both static and dynamic menu configuration.

title: Dropdown Menu
description: Implemented accessible dropdown menu with submenus, keyboard navigation, checkable items, and separator support. Positions dynamically based on viewport space.

title: Command Palette (Cmd+K)
description: Created a command palette inspired by VS Code. Fuzzy search across all available commands, keyboard shortcuts, recent actions, and category filtering.

title: Keyboard Shortcuts Manager
description: Built a centralized keyboard shortcut system with configurable bindings, conflict detection, scope-based activation, and a help modal showing all registered shortcuts.

title: Color Picker Component
description: Developed a custom color picker with hue/saturation canvas, opacity slider, hex input, preset swatches, and eyedropper support.

title: Date Picker Component
description: Created a date picker with month/year navigation, range selection, min/max date constraints, keyboard navigation, and custom date formatting.

title: Rich Text Editor
description: Integrated a rich text editor with toolbar for bold, italic, lists, headings, links, and image embedding. Supports markdown shortcuts and HTML output.

title: Code Editor Component
description: Embedded a code editor with syntax highlighting, line numbers, theme support, and read-only mode. Supports multiple languages with language detection.

title: Chart Component — Line
description: Implemented a line chart component with multiple series, tooltips, grid lines, responsive sizing, and smooth curves. Uses SVG for crisp rendering.

title: Chart Component — Bar
description: Built horizontal and vertical bar charts with stacked mode, grouped bars, data labels, and animations. Supports negative values and custom colors per bar.

title: Chart Component — Pie
description: Created pie and donut chart components with arc segments, percentage labels, center text, hover expansion, and legend interaction.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Assembled a full analytics dashboard combining line, bar, and metric cards. Includes date range picker, export to CSV, and real-time data refresh.

title: Notification Center
description: Built a notification center with bell icon badge, dropdown list of recent notifications, read/unread states, mark-all-read action, and notification preferences.

title: Activity Feed Component
description: Implemented a chronological activity feed with avatars, action descriptions, timestamps, and load-more pagination. Supports different activity types with icons.

title: Comment System
description: Created a threaded comment system with nested replies, upvoting, rich text input, @mentions, and real-time updates via WebSocket.

title: Rating & Review Component
description: Built star rating component with half-star precision, hover preview, click-to-rate, and read-only display mode. Includes aggregate review summary.

title: Carousel/Slider Component
description: Implemented image carousel with touch swipe support, dot indicators, arrow navigation, autoplay with pause on hover, and infinite loop mode.

title: Responsive Image Component
description: Created a responsive image component with lazy loading, aspect ratio preservation, blur placeholder, srcset generation, and WebP format support.

title: Video Player Component
description: Built a custom video player with play/pause, seek bar, volume control, fullscreen, speed selector, and picture-in-picture support. Accessible keyboard controls.

title: Audio Player Component
description: Created an audio player with waveform visualization, play/pause, seek, volume, playback speed, and playlist queue support. Minimal UI design.

title: Map Component Integration
description: Integrated map component with marker pins, info popups, custom tile layers, geolocation, search box, and cluster grouping for dense markers.

title: QR Code Generator
description: Built a QR code generator component with configurable size, error correction level, foreground/background colors, and download as PNG/SVG.

title: Export to CSV/PDF
description: Implemented data export functionality supporting CSV and PDF formats. Includes column selection, date range filtering, and progress indication for large datasets.

title: Drag and Drop List
description: Created sortable list with drag and drop reordering, touch support, drag handle customization, and animation. Uses HTML5 drag API for zero dependencies.

title: Tree View Component
description: Built a collapsible tree view for hierarchical data with expand/collapse all, search highlighting, drag-and-drop reordering, and lazy child loading.

title: Timeline Component
description: Designed a vertical timeline with alternating left/right item placement, custom icons per entry, connecting lines, and scroll-triggered animations.

title: Stepper Component
description: Implemented a multi-step wizard/stepper with vertical and horizontal orientations, step validation, navigation controls, and animated transitions between steps.

title: Cookie Consent Banner
description: Created GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with granular preference controls, accept all/necessary toggle, and persistent consent storage.

title: Announcement Bar
description: Built a dismissible announcement bar for site-wide notices. Supports multiple variants (info, warning, success), link actions, and scheduled display.

title: Countdown Timer
description: Implemented a countdown timer component with days/hours/minutes/seconds display, completion callback, and customizable styling for promotional events.

title: Pricing Table Component
description: Designed a pricing table with tiered plans, feature comparison columns, popular plan highlighting, annual/monthly toggle, and CTA buttons.

title: FAQ Accordion Section
description: Created an FAQ section using accordion pattern with search/filter functionality, category grouping, and schema.org structured data for SEO.

title: Testimonial Carousel
description: Built a testimonial slider with avatar, quote, name, and role fields. Includes autoplay, dot navigation, and fade/slide transition effects.

title: Team Members Grid
description: Designed a team member showcase grid with photos, roles, bio preview on hover, and social media links. Includes filter by department.

title: Blog Post Card
description: Created blog post card with cover image, category tag, title, excerpt, author info, reading time, and publish date. Hover effect with subtle elevation.

title: Blog Listing Page
description: Built the full blog listing page with grid layout, category filters, search, pagination, and featured post hero section.

title: Blog Post Layout
description: Designed the single blog post layout with table of contents, related posts sidebar, author bio box, comment section, and social share buttons.

title: Contact Form Page
description: Created a contact page with form fields (name, email, subject, message), Google reCAPTCHA integration, and success/error feedback states.

title: Landing Page Hero
description: Built a compelling hero section with headline, subheading, CTA buttons, background illustration, and floating elements for visual depth.

title: Feature Showcase Section
description: Designed a feature highlights section with icon cards, staggered reveal animations, and alternating image-text layout for key product features.

title: Stats Counter Section
description: Implemented animated statistics counter section with number animations on scroll, icon decoration, and responsive grid layout.

title: Newsletter Signup Form
description: Created a newsletter signup component with email input, submit button, success confirmation, and integration with email marketing service.

title: Footer Component
description: Built a comprehensive footer with multi-column links, social media icons, newsletter signup, legal links, and back-to-top button.

title: 404 Error Page
description: Designed a creative 404 page with illustration, helpful message, navigation links, and search bar to help lost users find their way.

title: Maintenance Mode Page
description: Created a maintenance/coming-soon page with countdown timer, email notification signup, and branded messaging.

title: Onboarding Flow
description: Built a multi-step onboarding wizard for new users with progress tracking, skip option, and personalization questions to tailor the experience.

title: API Route — User CRUD
description: Implemented RESTful API routes for user management: create, read, update, delete. Includes request validation, error handling, and pagination support.

title: API Route — Authentication
description: Created authentication API routes: login, register, logout, refresh token, and verify email. Uses JWT with HTTP-only cookies for secure session management.

title: API Route — File Upload
description: Built file upload API endpoint with multipart form handling, file type validation, size limits, cloud storage integration, and thumbnail generation.

title: Database Schema — Users
description: Designed and migrated the users table with all required fields, indexes, and row-level security policies. Includes profile and preferences tables.

title: Database Schema — Content
description: Created database schema for content management: posts, categories, tags, and media library tables. Implemented full-text search indexes.

title: Database Schema — Analytics
description: Set up analytics data model with events table, session tracking, page view aggregation, and performance-optimized materialized views.

title: Middleware — Rate Limiting
description: Implemented rate limiting middleware using token bucket algorithm. Configurable limits per endpoint with Redis-backed storage for distributed environments.

title: Middleware — Authentication
description: Created authentication middleware that validates JWT tokens, attaches user context to request, and handles role-based access control checks.

title: Middleware — Request Logging
description: Added request logging middleware with structured JSON output, response time measurement, request ID generation, and sensitive data redaction.

title: Error Handling Middleware
description: Built centralized error handling middleware that catches all exceptions, returns consistent error responses, and logs stack traces in development.

title: Environment Configuration
description: Set up environment-based configuration system with validation using Zod. Supports development, staging, and production environments with typed config objects.

title: Database Migrations Setup
description: Configured database migration tool with versioned migrations, up/down rollback support, seed data scripts, and automated migration on deploy.

title: Testing — Unit Tests
description: Wrote unit tests for utility functions, hooks, and components using Vitest. Achieved 85% coverage with edge case handling and mock implementations.

title: Testing — Integration Tests
description: Created integration tests for API endpoints, database operations, and authentication flow. Tests run against a test database with automated setup/teardown.

title: Testing — E2E Tests
description: Set up end-to-end testing with Playwright covering critical user journeys: signup, login, content creation, and settings update. CI pipeline integration.

title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
description: Configured GitHub Actions for continuous integration: lint, type-check, test, build. Added deploy job with environment promotion gates.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Audited and optimized bundle size with code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization, and tree shaking. Reduced initial load by 40%.

title: SEO Optimization
description: Implemented SEO best practices: meta tags, Open Graph, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap generation, canonical URLs, and robots.txt configuration.

title: Accessibility Audit
description: Conducted comprehensive accessibility audit using axe-core and manual testing. Fixed contrast ratios, keyboard navigation gaps, and screen reader issues.

title: Security Hardening
description: Applied security best practices: CSP headers, XSS protection, SQL injection prevention, CSRF tokens, secure cookie flags, and dependency vulnerability scanning.

title: PWA Implementation
description: Converted the app into a Progressive Web App with service worker, manifest.json, offline fallback page, and install prompt for mobile users.

title: i18n Internationalization
description: Set up internationalization framework with locale detection, translation files, pluralization rules, date/number formatting, and language switcher UI.

title: WebSocket Real-time Updates
description: Integrated WebSocket connection for real-time features: live notifications, collaborative editing, presence indicators, and data sync across clients.

title: Sentry Error Monitoring
description: Integrated Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring. Added source maps, breadcrumbs, user context, and custom performance spans for critical paths.

title: Analytics Integration
description: Added privacy-focused analytics tracking with custom events, page views, user sessions, and dashboard for monitoring key metrics and user behavior.

title: Documentation — Component Library
description: Created comprehensive component documentation with usage examples, props tables, live previews, and accessibility notes. Published as a Storybook site.

title: Documentation — API Reference
description: Built interactive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger specification, request/response examples, code snippets, and try-it-out functionality.

title: Final Release & Deployment
description: Orchestrated production release with zero-downtime deployment, environment health checks, rollback plan, release notes, and post-deployment monitoring.
